title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・我が君の凱旋

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And here's Air Groove, in an awe-inspiring burst
of speed! I can't believe it! She's overtaken
Silence Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Male Fan
text_block_list.text:
Woo! Air Groove, you're the bomb!
Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan
text_block_list.text:
Oh my goodness! Air Groove, that was
mind-blowing! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Em-press! Em-press! Em-press! Em-press!
Em-press! Em-press!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Yes. I...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: (I believe that was a worthy challenge.)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You were astounding. ...You completely
outclassed me this time.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It's because you paved the way ahead of me...
Because you were stronger than anyone else...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That's why I could challenge you with every last
ounce of energy I had.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'll never forget this race for as long as I live.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Me neither.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'll never forget the sight of you dashing ahead of
me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Let's race again someday. We'll have a rematch
even more exciting than this one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove comes back amidst deafening cheers
resounding all around.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I won. I did it this time.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That's right.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You've always believed in me, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Thank you.
